MDE Version Checking (mde-version.h)
[Miscellaneous Components]

Detailed Description

Macros to allow checking the version of the Multicore Development Environment as a whole.

Occasionally, it can be useful to check the version number of the overall Tilera Multicore Development Environment (MDE). For example, this approach can be used to determine whether or not to include calls to features that were only added in later releases of the MDE, or to implement workarounds for older versions of the MDE.

Note that there is often a better source of version information:

  • To check for particular gcc compatibility levels, use __GNUC__, __GNUC_MINOR__, and __GNUC_PATCHLEVEL__.

  • To test for particular open-source package levels, use the appropriate header, e.g. <gnu-versions.h> or <linux/version.h>.

  • To check the hardware that the toolchain is defined for, use the __tile__ macro (defined for any Tilera chip), the __tilegx__ macro (defined for any TILE-Gx chip), the __tilepro__ macro (defined for the TILEPro chip), or the __tile_chip__ macro (defined as "1" for TILE64, "2" for TILEPro, or "10" for TILE-Gx).

In general, there are only two ways users should use the headers in this file.

First, you can compare MDE_VERSION_CODE to MDE_VERSION() for a specific release. For example:

  #if MDE_VERSION_CODE >= MDE_VERSION(2,1,0)
  ...
  #endif

This will bracket code that should only be enabled when built with MDE version 2.1.0 or later.

Second, you can capture the MDE version into an application for later display. In this case, you can include a reference to MDE_ID as a way to include an identifier to the MDE version with which the application was built.

Defines

#define MDE_VERSION(a, b, c)   (((a) << 16) + ((b) << 8) + (c))
 Convert a (major,minor,patchlevel) version triple to an opaque integer.
#define MDE_VERSION_CODE   MDE_VERSION(_MDE_VERSION,_MDE_MINOR,_MDE_PATCHLEVEL)
 Return the opaque integer corresponding to the current release.
#define _MDE_VERSION   4
 Provide the major version of this release.
#define _MDE_MINOR   3
 Provide the minor version of this release.
#define _MDE_PATCHLEVEL   4
 Provide the patch level of this release.
#define MDE_ID   "4.3.4"
 A string value of form "X.Y.Z" corresponding to the current release.
#define _MDE_ID(v, m, p)   #v "." #m "." #p
 Convert a (major,minor,patchlevel) version triple to a string.

Define Documentation

#define MDE_VERSION ( a,
b,
c   )     (((a) << 16) + ((b) << 8) + (c))

Convert a (major,minor,patchlevel) version triple to an opaque integer.

#define MDE_VERSION_CODE   MDE_VERSION(_MDE_VERSION,_MDE_MINOR,_MDE_PATCHLEVEL)

Return the opaque integer corresponding to the current release.

#define _MDE_VERSION   4

Provide the major version of this release.

#define _MDE_MINOR   3

Provide the minor version of this release.

#define _MDE_PATCHLEVEL   4

Provide the patch level of this release.

#define MDE_ID   "4.3.4"

A string value of form "X.Y.Z" corresponding to the current release.

#define _MDE_ID ( v,
m,
p   )     #v "." #m "." #p

Convert a (major,minor,patchlevel) version triple to a string.
